title: Warm Spicy Mediterranean Lamb Kebabs
description: A herbal and pillowy Mediterranean dish featuring lamb kebabs with cayenne pepper and ferment-kimchi, perfect for a gluten-free friendly dinner
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked through
While the kebabs are cooking, heat the ferment-kimchi in a small saucepan over low heat
Serve the kebabs hot with the warm ferment-kimchi spooned over the top
Garnish with fresh parsley or oregano, if desired
